## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between StackBlitz and GrowthX to review project progress and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has prepared comprehensive strategy docs for StackBlitz's review, including starter kits, competitor analysis, and personas](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Project is ready for volume production, pending StackBlitz's feedback on prepared materials](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [StackBlitz team is considering a two-pronged approach for website redesign: building specific pages first, then full site later](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Topics

### Project Preparation and Strategy

  - [GrowthX has completed extensive preparatory work, including example index pages, comparison pages, and competitor research](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Team is ready to start high-volume production of starter kits and comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Approach involves simultaneous work on starter kits project and comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [GrowthX has hired an additional programmer specifically for this project](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### Document Review Request

  - [Mitchell (StackBlitz) to review three key outputs:](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
    1.  Example index page (built with one-shot prompts)
    2.  Comparison pages (fact-checked and built with Vault)
    3.  Competitor research methodology
  - [GrowthX seeks feedback on feature matrix, Bolt features research, personas, and writing styles](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Review crucial for informing workflow output and ensuring accuracy before scaling production](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### Hackathon Consideration

  - [GrowthX open to adjusting output focus towards hackathon-specific templates and guides](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Awaiting StackBlitz's input on any particular hackathon requirements](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### User Research and Data

  - [GrowthX has good understanding of survey data and prompt analysis from StackBlitz](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Still need retention data to identify highest leverage points](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Plan to conduct user interviews to inform targeted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### StackBlitz Website Redesign

  - [StackBlitz team considering a two-pronged approach:](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
    1.  Build a couple of pages in Framer
    2.  Move to full site build later
  - [Final decision pending discussion with designers](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mitchell to review and provide feedback on GrowthX's prepared documents](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [GrowthX to await feedback before starting volume production](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Mitchell to follow up with designers on website redesign approach](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [KJ (StackBlitz) to provide retention data to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [GrowthX to initiate user interviews once more clarity is obtained on user segments](https://fathom.video/share/XJiyu4TtFV8Hhy4D5xLTSAjup6Y8XQxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
